creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The ports devel/go-tools and sysutils/vagrant cannot be installed together. 

Installing rubygem-bundler-1.14.6...
pkg-static: rubygem-bundler-1.14.6 conflicts with go-tools-20170328 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/bundle
*** Error code 70

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/rubygem-bundler
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/vagrant
